form.formComment: Improved two runs back to score then won again last start over 450m at this track (25.00), beating Swift Wind. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved two runs back to score then won again last start over 450m at this track (25.00), beating Swift Wind. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 450m in 25.06 last start, beating Digger Sure Can. Safe beginner and will give a great sight.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 450m in 25.06 last start, beating Digger Sure Can. Safe beginner and will give a great sight.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 450m in 25.56. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 450m at this track at Mix level. Would be better placed in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back at this track over 450m in 25.56. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 450m at this track at Mix level. Would be better placed in something easier.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and lost ground rounding the 1st turn.

form.formComment: Finished third last time (25.09) over 450m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Has to do a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third last time (25.09) over 450m at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Has to do a bit more.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd over 324m at Richmond Straight beaten 1.5 lengths (17.79) behind Noir in a Grade 5 on April 2. Prefer to watch at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd over 324m at Richmond Straight beaten 1.5 lengths (17.79) behind Noir in a Grade 5 on April 2. Prefer to watch at this stage.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the home straight.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running and set it up early clocking 24.81 with a nose win at this track over 450m. In form and expected to run well again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the ground running and set it up early clocking 24.81 with a nose win at this track over 450m. In form and expected to run well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels entering the first turn and ran wide.

form.formComment: Looks close to another win after his success on February 23 at this track over 400m. Last start was second over 324m in 17.78, behind Really Savage. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Looks close to another win after his success on February 23 at this track over 400m. Last start was second over 324m in 17.78, behind Really Savage. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (25.70) over 450m at this track. Jumps from the outside. Deserves respect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when third (25.70) over 450m at this track. Jumps from the outside. Deserves respect.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 6 lengths over 400m at The Gardens (22.88). Looks to be back in fine fettle. Makes plenty of appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 6 lengths over 400m at The Gardens (22.88). Looks to be back in fine fettle. Makes plenty of appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened rounding the home turn and fell.
